meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Let's talk about your next project. Request a quote or send a general inquiry.

hero.title: Let's talk about your next project.
hero.description: Whether you're a general contractor, architect, developer, or commercial client — our estimating team is ready to help.

details.title: Contact Details
details.bidBody: Add us to your bid list — we'd love to quote your next project.

fields.filesHint: (PDF, DWG, images — up to 10 MB each)

placeholders.quoteMessage: Scope, sector, key milestones, or anything else we should know.

upload.hint: Attach shop drawings, RFPs, spec sheets, or reference images

success.title: Thank you for your request.
success.body: Our estimating team will follow up within one business day.

uploadTip.title: Having trouble uploading drawings?
uploadTip.bodyBefore: Large or multi-file drawing sets can occasionally get stuck in the uploader. If that happens — or if you'd simply prefer to send them directly — please email your project files to
uploadTip.bodyAfter: after submitting this form. Include your project name so our team can match it to your request.

errors.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 3 characters
errors.fullNameMax: Full name must be 50 characters or fewer
errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (7–15 digits)
errors.timelinePast: Timeline can't be in the past
errors.fileType: {{name}}: unsupported file type (PDF, DWG or images only)
